interfaces.name: ProjectLifecycle
interfaces.signature: enum ProjectLifecycle: String, Codable, Sendable { case active, archived }
interfaces.notes: User-visible project/archive state only; not subscription lock state.

interfaces.name: ProjectAccessState
interfaces.signature: enum ProjectAccessState: String, Codable, Sendable { case normal, lockedReadOnlyDueToPlan }
interfaces.notes: Derived and persisted access state for downgrade handling.

interfaces.name: AreaLifecycle
interfaces.signature: enum AreaLifecycle: String, Codable, Sendable { case active, archived }
interfaces.notes: Areas are soft-state, never cascade-delete issues.

interfaces.name: IssueSeverity
interfaces.signature: enum IssueSeverity: String, Codable, CaseIterable, Sendable { case minor, moderate, urgent }
interfaces.notes: Fixed vocabulary for v1.

interfaces.name: IssueStatus
interfaces.signature: enum IssueStatus: String, Codable, CaseIterable, Sendable { case open, monitor, repairNeeded, resolved }
interfaces.notes: Fixed vocabulary for v1.

interfaces.name: MeasurementSource
interfaces.signature: enum MeasurementSource: String, Codable, Sendable { case manual, ar }
interfaces.notes: Manual and AR share one schema.

interfaces.name: MeasurementUnit
interfaces.signature: enum MeasurementUnit: String, Codable, CaseIterable, Sendable { case inches, feetInches, centimeters, meters }
interfaces.notes: US-customary default, settings override.

interfaces.name: ARConfidenceState
interfaces.signature: enum ARConfidenceState: String, Codable, Sendable { case unsupported, unstable, measured }
interfaces.notes: Separate from capability check so reports and UI can label trust honestly.

interfaces.name: Measurement
interfaces.signature: struct Measurement: Codable, Sendable, Equatable { var value: Double; var unit: MeasurementUnit; var source: MeasurementSource; var arConfidence: ARConfidenceState? }
interfaces.notes: Single issue measurement payload regardless of source.

interfaces.name: PhotoAssetState
interfaces.signature: enum PhotoAssetState: Codable, Sendable, Equatable { case pending; case ready(originalRelativePath: String, thumbnailRelativePath: String?); case missingOrCorrupted }
interfaces.notes: Required shared contract across capture, thumbnails, detail, and export.

interfaces.name: ProjectModel
interfaces.signature: struct ProjectModel: Identifiable, Sendable { var id: UUID; var name: String; var siteLabel: String?; var createdAt: Date; var updatedAt: Date; var lifecycle: ProjectLifecycle; var accessState: ProjectAccessState }
interfaces.notes: Domain mirror/snapshot shape used across lanes; SwiftData model may wrap same fields.

interfaces.name: AreaModel
interfaces.signature: struct AreaModel: Identifiable, Sendable { var id: UUID; var projectID: UUID; var name: String; var createdAt: Date; var updatedAt: Date; var lifecycle: AreaLifecycle; var displayOrder: Int }
interfaces.notes: Duplicate names allowed within a project.

interfaces.name: IssueModel
interfaces.signature: struct IssueModel: Identifiable, Sendable { var id: UUID; var projectID: UUID; var areaID: UUID; var createdAt: Date; var updatedAt: Date; var capturedAt: Date; var severity: IssueSeverity; var status: IssueStatus; var note: String?; var measurement: Measurement?; var photoState: PhotoAssetState }
interfaces.notes: No separate draft model; record exists after shutter success.

interfaces.name: BusinessProfileModel
interfaces.signature: struct BusinessProfileModel: Sendable { var companyName: String; var contactLine: String?; var logoRelativePath: String? }
interfaces.notes: Pro branding input for reports.

interfaces.name: AppSettingsModel
interfaces.signature: struct AppSettingsModel: Sendable { var preferredMeasurementUnit: MeasurementUnit; var lastUsedProjectID: UUID?; var lastUsedAreaID: UUID? }
interfaces.notes: Small persisted settings surface only.

interfaces.name: EntitlementTier
interfaces.signature: enum EntitlementTier: String, Sendable { case free, pro }
interfaces.notes: Effective app tier only.

interfaces.name: EntitlementSnapshot
interfaces.signature: struct EntitlementSnapshot: Sendable, Equatable { var tier: EntitlementTier; var activeProjectLimit: Int?; var checkedAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: Cached locally and consulted at safe enforcement points only.

interfaces.name: ProjectRepository
interfaces.signature: protocol ProjectRepository { @MainActor func fetchProjects() throws -> [ProjectModel]; @MainActor func createProject(name: String, siteLabel: String?) throws -> ProjectModel; @MainActor func updateProject(_ project: ProjectModel) throws; @MainActor func archiveProject(id: UUID) throws; @MainActor func unarchiveProject(id: UUID) throws }
interfaces.notes: Main-actor bound because backed by SwiftData ModelContext.

interfaces.name: AreaRepository
interfaces.signature: protocol AreaRepository { @MainActor func fetchAreas(projectID: UUID) throws -> [AreaModel]; @MainActor func createArea(projectID: UUID, name: String) throws -> AreaModel; @MainActor func updateArea(_ area: AreaModel) throws; @MainActor func archiveArea(id: UUID) throws }
interfaces.notes: No hard delete on non-empty area.

interfaces.name: IssueRepository
interfaces.signature: protocol IssueRepository { @MainActor func fetchIssues(projectID: UUID) throws -> [IssueModel]; @MainActor func createPendingIssue(projectID: UUID, areaID: UUID, capturedAt: Date) throws -> IssueModel; @MainActor func updateIssue(_ issue: IssueModel) throws; @MainActor func deleteIssue(id: UUID) throws }
interfaces.notes: Pending issue creation is explicit to support interruption-safe capture flow.

interfaces.name: ProjectPolicy
interfaces.signature: struct ProjectPolicy { func canCreateProject(currentActiveCount: Int, entitlement: EntitlementSnapshot) -> Bool; func applyDowngradeLock(projects: [ProjectModel], entitlement: EntitlementSnapshot) -> [UUID] }
interfaces.notes: Centralizes free-tier cap and downgrade lock rules.

interfaces.name: IssueFilter
interfaces.signature: struct IssueFilter: Sendable, Equatable { var areaIDs: Set<UUID>; var severities: Set<IssueSeverity>; var statuses: Set<IssueStatus> }
interfaces.notes: Shared between Workspace issue segment and report previews if needed.

interfaces.name: MeasurementFormatter
interfaces.signature: struct MeasurementFormatter { func string(from measurement: Measurement, preferredUnit: MeasurementUnit) -> String }
interfaces.notes: Single formatting source for UI and export.

interfaces.name: CameraCaptureResult
interfaces.signature: struct CameraCaptureResult: Sendable { var issueID: UUID; var imageData: Data; var capturedAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: Raw capture payload before compression/storage.

interfaces.name: CameraAvailability
interfaces.signature: enum CameraAvailability: Sendable, Equatable { case ready; case permissionDenied; case temporarilyUnavailable(reason: String); case lowStorage }
interfaces.notes: Distinct user-facing states required by product spec.

interfaces.name: CameraCapturing
interfaces.signature: protocol CameraCapturing { @MainActor func prepare() async; @MainActor func currentAvailability() -> CameraAvailability; @MainActor func capturePhoto(for issueID: UUID) async throws -> CameraCaptureResult }
interfaces.notes: Protocol boundary required for UI tests and simulator testing.

interfaces.name: MeasurementAvailability
interfaces.signature: enum MeasurementAvailability: Sendable, Equatable { case manualOnly; case arUnsupported; case arUnstable; case arReady }
interfaces.notes: UI consumes this to keep one measurement field with internal branching.

interfaces.name: MeasurementProviding
interfaces.signature: protocol MeasurementProviding { @MainActor func availability() -> MeasurementAvailability; @MainActor func captureARMeasurement() async throws -> Measurement }
interfaces.notes: Abstracts ARKit for unsupported/unstable/success simulation.

interfaces.name: PhotoAssetStore
interfaces.signature: protocol PhotoAssetStore { func persistCapturedPhoto(_ result: CameraCaptureResult) async throws -> PhotoAssetState; func loadImageData(for state: PhotoAssetState) throws -> Data }
interfaces.notes: Implements downsample, compression, EXIF stripping, temp-write then atomic move.

interfaces.name: StorageHealthService
interfaces.signature: protocol StorageHealthService { func hasSufficientCapacityForCapture() -> Bool }
interfaces.notes: Preflight low-storage check before shutter.

interfaces.name: ReportIssueSnapshot
interfaces.signature: struct ReportIssueSnapshot: Sendable { var id: UUID; var areaName: String; var capturedAt: Date; var severity: IssueSeverity; var status: IssueStatus; var note: String?; var measurementText: String?; var measurementSource: MeasurementSource?; var photoState: PhotoAssetState }
interfaces.notes: Background-safe export input; never pass SwiftData models off-main.

interfaces.name: ReportDocumentSnapshot
interfaces.signature: struct ReportDocumentSnapshot: Sendable { var projectName: String; var generatedAt: Date; var businessProfile: BusinessProfileModel?; var issues: [ReportIssueSnapshot] }
interfaces.notes: Complete report render input assembled on main actor.

interfaces.name: ReportSnapshotBuilder
interfaces.signature: struct ReportSnapshotBuilder { @MainActor func build(project: ProjectModel, areas: [AreaModel], issues: [IssueModel], settings: AppSettingsModel, businessProfile: BusinessProfileModel?) -> ReportDocumentSnapshot }
interfaces.notes: Owns grouping/order/degradation metadata before render.

interfaces.name: ReportRendering
interfaces.signature: protocol ReportRendering { func renderPDF(from snapshot: ReportDocumentSnapshot, entitlement: EntitlementSnapshot) async throws -> URL }
interfaces.notes: Renderer takes snapshot + entitlement, never queries StoreKit internally.

interfaces.name: EntitlementServicing
interfaces.signature: protocol EntitlementServicing { func currentSnapshot() -> EntitlementSnapshot; func refreshIfNeeded() async; func restorePurchases() async throws }
interfaces.notes: App-scoped long-lived service fed by StoreKit and scenePhase.

interfaces.name: CaptureCoordinatorModel
interfaces.signature: struct CaptureCoordinatorModel: Sendable { var issue: IssueModel; var cameraAvailability: CameraAvailability; var measurementAvailability: MeasurementAvailability }
interfaces.notes: UI-facing aggregate state for Capture screen only; not persisted as-is.

interfaces.name: beginIssueCapture
interfaces.signature: @MainActor func beginIssueCapture(projectID: UUID, areaID: UUID, issueRepo: IssueRepository) throws -> IssueModel
interfaces.notes: Creates pending issue immediately after shutter flow starts or succeeds per implementation wiring.

interfaces.name: finalizeCapturedPhoto
interfaces.signature: func finalizeCapturedPhoto(result: CameraCaptureResult, photoStore: PhotoAssetStore, issueRepo: IssueRepository) async throws
interfaces.notes: Persists image off-main and patches issue photo state on main actor.

interfaces.name: verifyProjectCreationAllowed
interfaces.signature: @MainActor func verifyProjectCreationAllowed(projectRepo: ProjectRepository, entitlementService: EntitlementServicing, policy: ProjectPolicy) throws -> Bool
interfaces.notes: Safe enforcement checkpoint before creating a project.
